blocks.text: A local companion reading runtime for extracting page context and serving governed chat streams.
Create a virtual environment before running the FastAPI runtime.
Install runtime dependencies from the repository requirement files.
The README fixture preserves list and code content so downstream modules can consume source ordered chunks.

text:
A local companion reading runtime for extracting page context and serving governed chat streams.
Create a virtual environment before running the FastAPI runtime.
Install runtime dependencies from the repository requirement files.
PYTHONPATH=services/local-runtime python3 -m pytest -q services/local-runtime/tests
The README fixture preserves list and code content so downstream modules can consume source ordered chunks.
